item.title: MIUI OS3.0.3.0.WOOCNXM Fastboot update for Redmi Note 14 Pro 5G / POCO X7 China
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi Note 14 Pro 5G / POCO X7 China

Codename: malachite

Version: OS3.0.3.0.WOOCNXM | 16.0

Size: 9.3 GB

MD5: d04c5bbe019abe1e4868429da6ac96e0

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to February 2026. Increased system security.
